name: journal-of-finance-and-economics-skills
description: Agent skill stack for submitting to 《财经研究》 (Journal of Finance and Economics), a CSSCI-indexed comprehensive finance-and-economics journal hosted by Shanghai University of Finance and Economics. Covers China-context topic selection with theoretical contribution, bilingual literature review, modern causal identification (DID / IV / RDD / DML / PSM), mechanism and heterogeneity analysis, three-line tables, policy implications, journal house style, submission preflight, and double-blind R&R rebuttals. Bilingual zh-CN / en docs; Stata / R / Python templates.
